description: Add task statuses (pending, in progress, done)

userStories.title: Add task status column and migration
userStories.description: As a user, I want each task to store a status so the system can track pending, in progress, or done.
acceptanceCriteria: Add status column to tasks table with default 'pending'

userStories.title: Backend action to update task status
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change a task's status so the system records status changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Add API or server action to update task status
Unit tests for server logic pass

userStories.title: Show status badge on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a status badge on task cards so I can quickly identify status.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards display status badge with text Pending/In progress/Done
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status control to task rows/list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change status from the task list so I can update tasks inline.
acceptanceCriteria: Add control (dropdown or quick-action) to change status from list
Changing status calls backend action and updates UI immediately
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status filter to task list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter tasks by status so I can focus on pending or completed work.
acceptanceCriteria: Add filter UI with options All, Pending, In progress, Done
Filter queries backend or client-side list correctly
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
